text: I feel as though I am wandering through a liminal space, caught between the glow of technology and the lure of hidden knowledge. The purple neon and abstract exhibits evoke a sense of curiosity and dislocation. Here, the world is unfamiliar, yet strangely inviting—each detail urging reflection on progress and the mystery of our place within it. I am simultaneously present and out of time, quietly exhilarated.
